person_relationships.description: Colleague at Temasek; Dilhan is CEO of Temasek Holdings while Chia Song Hwee is CEO of Temasek Global Investments.

major_achievements.achievement: Joined Temasek and rose through multiple senior leadership roles including Co-CEO, COO, and President.
Appointed President and CEO of Chartered Semiconductor Manufacturing, a major Singapore-headquartered semiconductor foundry.
Appointed Chief Executive Officer of Temasek Global Investments, overseeing Temasek's investment portfolio management.

biography_summary: Chia Song Hwee is a Singaporean business executive who serves as the Chief Executive Officer of Temasek Global Investments, appointed on 1 April 2026. He joined Temasek in October 2011 and held various senior leadership roles including Co-Chief Executive Officer, Chief Operating Officer, and President of Temasek International. He also led the Investment, Credit Portfolio, and Strategy Groups as well as Temasek market teams in Singapore and China. Prior to Temasek, Song Hwee was the Chief Operating Officer at GLOBALFOUNDRIES and previously served as President and CEO of Chartered Semiconductor Manufacturing from 2002 to 2009. He has also served as a Director at ISTARI, a cybersecurity platform.

collection_meta.notes: Enriched with data from Temasek official leadership page and Crunchbase. Career history, current positions, major achievements, and biography_summary added.
